name: Grilled Whole Salmon Fillet
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the teriyaki sauce, lemon juice, brown sugar, oil, and garlic in a bowl and stir to mix.
2. Place the salmon, skin side down, on two layers of heavy-duty foil. Remove any thin white pin bones.
3. Baste the salmon with the soy mixture.
4. Let the salmon stand while preparing the grill at medium-low heat.
5. Place the fish on the grill, keeping the lid and vents open. Cook for about 30 minutes, basting occasionally, until the thickest part of the fish is opaque and reaches 135°F to 140°F on an instant-read thermometer.
6. Transfer the salmon to a platter. Serve hot or cold.
